Part.Source:
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */

Event Start retornaAutorizacao.Call('WWDESCONTO', Status_SimNao.Sim, 1, &AutNiv) LoadWWPContext.Call(&Context) &EmpCod = &Context.EmpCod &FilCod = &Context.FilCod /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ Grid.Rows = Page.Rows Grid_Empowerer.GridInternalName = Grid.InternalName &DesSts = nullvalue(&DesSts) DDO_Grid.GridInternalName = Grid.InternalName Form.Caption = ' Desconto' Do 'PrepareTransaction' Do 'LoadGridState' If &OrderedBy < 1 &OrderedBy = 1 Do 'SetDDOSortedStatus' EndIf &DDO_TitleSettingsIcons = GetWWPTitleSettingsIcons() GridPaginationBar.RowsPerPageSelectedValue = Grid.Rows /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ if &DesDta_To.IsEmpty() &DesDta_To = serverdate() &DesDta = &DesDta_To.AddDays(-30) Endif EndEvent Event Refresh /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ LoadWWPContext.Call(&Context) Do 'SaveGridState' &GridCurrentPage = Grid.CurrentPage &GridPageCount = Grid.PageCount DesSts.ColumnHeaderClass = !'WWColumn hidden-xs' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event GridPaginationBar.ChangePage /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ Do Case Case GridPaginationBar.SelectedPage = !'Previous' Grid.PreviousPage() Case GridPaginationBar.SelectedPage = !'Next' Grid.NextPage() Otherwise &PageToGo.FromString(GridPaginationBar.SelectedPage) Grid.GotoPage(&PageToGo) EndCase /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event GridPaginationBar.ChangeRowsPerPage /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ Grid.Rows = GridPaginationBar.RowsPerPageSelectedValue Grid.FirstPage() /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event DDO_Grid.OnOptionClicked /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ Do Case Case DDO_Grid.ActiveEventKey = !'<#OrderASC#>' OR DDO_Grid.ActiveEventKey = !'<#OrderDSC#>' &OrderedBy.FromString(DDO_Grid.SelectedValue_get) &OrderedDsc = iif(DDO_Grid.ActiveEventKey = !'<#OrderDSC#>', true, false) Do 'SetDDOSortedStatus' Grid.FirstPage() EndCase /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event Grid.Load /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &Acao = !'' &ActionGroupGrid.Clear() &ActionGroupGrid.AddItem(0, 'WWP_ActionGroupCaption') If (DesSts = Status_AbertoFechado.Fechado) &ActionGroupGrid.AddItem(1, 'Editar Desc.') Endif If (DesSts = Status_AbertoFechado.Aberto) &ActionGroupGrid.AddItem(2, 'Finalizar Desc.') Endif &ActionGroupGrid.AddItem(3, 'Excluir Desc.') Do Case Case DesSts = Status_AbertoFechado.Aberto DesSts.ColumnClass = !'WWColumn hidden-xs WWColumnTag WWColumnTagWarning WWColumnTagWarningSingleCell' Case DesSts = Status_AbertoFechado.Fechado DesSts.ColumnClass = !'WWColumn hidden-xs WWColumnTag WWColumnTagSuccess WWColumnTagSuccessSingleCell' Otherwise DesSts.ColumnClass = 'WWColumn hidden-xs' EndCase /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ &AuxDesCod = DesCod Do 'TotalDesconto' RetornaPlanoContas.Call(EmpCod, DesPlanCodDesc, &PlanNom, &PlanNomCredito) RetornaPlanoContas.Call(EmpCod, DesPlanCodTrf, &PlanNom, &PlanNomDebito) if DesSts = Status_AbertoFechado.Fechado &Acao = !'' EndIf EndEvent Event &ActionGroupGrid.Click /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ Do Case Case &ActionGroupGrid = 1 Do 'Do Reabrir' Case &ActionGroupGrid = 2 Do 'Do finalizar' Case &ActionGroupGrid = 3 Do 'Do Excluir' EndCase &ActionGroupGrid = 0 /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event DVelop_ConfirmPanel_Reabrir.Close /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ If DVelop_ConfirmPanel_Reabrir.Result = !'Yes' Do 'Do Action Reabrir' EndIf /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event DVelop_ConfirmPanel_Excluir.Close /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ If DVelop_ConfirmPanel_Excluir.Result = !'Yes' Do 'Do Action Excluir' EndIf /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event 'DoInsert' if 1 =2 /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ Desconto.Call(TrnMode.Insert, nullvalue(EmpCod), nullvalue(DesCod)) /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ else NovoDesconto.Call(TrnMode.Insert, &EmpCod, 0) EndIF EndEvent Event 'DoMonitoraDupDescontadas' MonitoraDuplicatasDescontadas.Call(&EmpCod) /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event 'DoExport' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ // Generate Excel spreadsheet and download it. Do 'LoadGridState' ExportWWDesconto.Call(&ExcelFilename, &ErrorMessage) If (&ExcelFilename <> "") Link(&ExcelFilename) Else msg(&ErrorMessage) Endif /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Sub 'SetDDOSortedStatus' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ DDO_Grid.SortedStatus = &OrderedBy.ToString().Trim() + !':' + iif(&OrderedDsc, !'DSC', !'ASC') /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'Do Reabrir' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &EmpCod_Selected = EmpCod &DesCod_Selected = DesCod DVelop_ConfirmPanel_Reabrir.Confirm() /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'Do Action Reabrir' retornaAutorizacao.Call('WWDESCONTO', Status_SimNao.Nao, 3, &AutNiv) if &AutNiv > 2 /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ RemoveFinanceiroDesconto.Call(&EmpCod_Selected, &DesCod_Selected, 1) //niv 1 nao deleta a capa nem as duplicatas selecionadas (tabelas Desconto e DescontoDuplicatas) Refresh Else msg('Usuario nao autorizado ao WWDESCONTO nivel 3') Endif EndSub Sub 'Do finalizar' retornaAutorizacao.Call('WWDESCONTO', Status_SimNao.Nao, 3, &AutNiv) if &AutNiv > 2 For each order EmpCod, DesCod, DesDupItmCod where EmpCod = EmpCod where DesCod = DesCod &DesDupItmCod = DesDupItmCod exit EndFor if &DesDupItmCod >= 1 For each order EmpCod, CbrCod where EmpCod = EmpCod where CbrCod = CbrCod &CtaBanCod = CbrCtaBanCod exit EndFor prcValidaCaixaAberto.Call(EmpCod, &CtaBanCod, DesDta, &IsCaixaFechado, &Msg) if &IsCaixaFechado = false and DesSts = Status_AbertoFechado.Aberto //se tiver fechado nao mexe financeiro nem altera ? GravaFinanceiroDesconto.Call(EmpCod, DesCod,DesOpe) wwDesconto.Link() else msg(&msg) EndIf else msg('Atenção! Nenhuma duplicata selecionada para finalizar este desconto!') EndIf Else msg('Usuario nao autorizado ao WWDESCONTO nivel 3') Endif /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'Do Excluir' retornaAutorizacao.Call('WWDESCONTO', Status_SimNao.Nao, 3, &AutNiv) if &AutNiv > 2 /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &EmpCod_Selected = EmpCod &DesCod_Selected = DesCod DVelop_ConfirmPanel_Excluir.Confirm() /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ Else msg('Usuario nao autorizado ao WWDESCONTO nivel 3') Endif EndSub Sub 'Do Action Excluir' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ RemoveFinanceiroDesconto.Call(&EmpCod_Selected, &DesCod_Selected, 2) //niv 2 pra deletar tudo Refresh EndSub Sub 'LoadGridState' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ // Load grid state from session. If &Session.Get(&PgmName + !"GridState") = !"" &GridState.FromXml(LoadGridState.Udp(&PgmName + !"GridState")) Else &GridState.FromXml(&Session.Get(&PgmName + !"GridState")) Endif &OrderedBy = &GridState.OrderedBy &OrderedDsc = &GridState.OrderedDsc Do 'SetDDOSortedStatus' For &GridStateFilterValue in &GridState.FilterValues Do Case Case &GridStateFilterValue.Name = !"DESDTA" &DesDta.FromString(&GridStateFilterValue.Value) &DesDta_To.FromString(&GridStateFilterValue.ValueTo) Case &GridStateFilterValue.Name = !"DESSTS" &DesSts.FromString(&GridStateFilterValue.Value) Case &GridStateFilterValue.Name = !"DESTIP" &DesTip.FromString(&GridStateFilterValue.Value) Case &GridStateFilterValue.Name = !"DESCOD" &DesCod.FromString(&GridStateFilterValue.Value) EndCase EndFor If not &GridState.PageSize.Trim().IsEmpty() Grid.Rows = &GridState.PageSize.ToNumeric() EndIf Grid.CurrentPage = &GridState.CurrentPage /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'SaveGridState' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &GridState.FromXml(&Session.Get(&PgmName + !"GridState")) // Save grid state in session. &GridState.OrderedBy = &OrderedBy &GridState.OrderedDsc = &OrderedDsc &GridState.FilterValues.Clear() WWP_GridStateAddFilterValue(&GridState, !"DESDTA", "", not (&DesDta.IsEmpty() AND &DesDta_To.IsEmpty()), 0, &DesDta.ToString().Trim(), &DesDta_To.ToString().Trim()) WWP_GridStateAddFilterValue(&GridState, !"DESSTS", "", not &DesSts.IsEmpty(), 0, &DesSts, '') WWP_GridStateAddFilterValue(&GridState, !"DESTIP", "", not &DesTip.IsEmpty(), 0, &DesTip, '') WWP_GridStateAddFilterValue(&GridState, !"DESCOD", "", not &DesCod.IsEmpty(), 0, &DesCod.ToString().Trim(), '') &GridState.PageSize = str(Grid.Rows) &GridState.CurrentPage = Grid.CurrentPage SaveGridState.Call(&PgmName + !"GridState", &GridState.ToXml()) /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'PrepareTransaction' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &TrnContext = new() &TrnContext.CallerObject = &Pgmname &TrnContext.CallerOnDelete = True &TrnContext.CallerURL = &HTTPRequest.ScriptName + !"?" + &HTTPRequest.QueryString &TrnContext.TransactionName = !"Desconto" &Session.Set(!"TrnContext", &TrnContext.ToXml()) /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Event &Acao.Click NovoDesconto.Call(TrnMode.Update, EmpCod, DesCod) EndEvent Sub 'TotalDesconto' &TotalDesconto = 0 For Each Order EmpCod, DesCod, DesDupItmCod WHere EmpCod = &EmpCod Where DesCod = &AuxDesCod &DesFilCod = DesFilCod &DesCreCod = DesCreCod Do 'loadDuplicata' &TotalDesconto += &CreVlrDup EndFor EndSub Sub 'loadDUplicata' For each order EmpCod, FilCod, CreCod where EmpCod = &EmpCod where FilCod = &DesFilCod where CreCod = &DesCreCod &CreVlrDup = CreVlrDup exit EndFor EndSub

/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */
